label: Barlaam and Joasaph, The Dormition of Our Lady, Lives of Saints

note: Lives of SS. Theodore of the Monastery of St. Sabas, Mark of Scetes, known as at-Tarmaqānī, Maximus and Dometius, Onuphrius-whose life is written by St. Paphnutius, Onesima, Stratonica and Seleucus, Martianus, Simeon, Archelides, “God’s Man”, John of the Well, Mary the Egyptian, written by Sophronius Patriarch of Jerusalem, Maurice (Mōrīq), and Simeon known as Mār Qūmī
